top_signals.title: Bank Indonesia Rate Hike in Play as Rupiah Plumbs New Lows
top_signals.summary: Indonesia may see its first interest-rate hike in two years as the rupiah’s slide to record lows this week intensifies pressure for the central bank to mount a stronger defense of the currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
